title: Refresh stale legacy global bee skill copies in place on every onboard (version consistency)
action: Field report: repo runs bee 1.3.1 but ~/.claude/skills/bee-* still carries 0.1.42 (pre-1.0 global install); Claude Code loads BOTH skill roots so users see two conflicting bee versions. Since 0.1.34 per-project sync is default and the global root is only touched with --global-skills, so stale legacy copies never get updated. Fix in onboard_bee.mjs: without --global-skills, add a refresh-only global target — for each managed skill whose directory ALREADY EXISTS under the legacy global skills root, sync it to current content exactly like other targets; NEVER create a global copy that does not exist; NEVER delete anything (deletion stays plugin-first-ledger territory). --global-skills keeps existing semantics (full management incl. creation). Plan/apply actions must be distinctly labeled (e.g. refresh_legacy_global_skill) so the plan preview shows what will be touched. Extend test_onboard_bee.mjs: (1) a stale global copy of a managed skill gets refreshed to source content on plain onboard; (2) a skill absent from the global root is NOT created; (3) a foreign/global non-managed dir (bee-custom included) is untouched; (4) --global-skills behavior unchanged; (5) managed-map/up_to_date semantics stay consistent (a refreshed global does not flip drift or break recheck).

trace.verification_evidence: RED (original engine, new legacy-refresh cases): 4 FAIL — "legacy refresh: plan refreshes exactly the managed skills already present in the global root :: []", "apply output labels the refresh action distinctly :: []", "stale bee-alpha refreshed to current source content :: # alpha STALE 0.1.42", "stale bee-hive marker refreshed to the current source version :: export const BEE_VERSION = '0.1.42'". GREEN (modified engine): unit suite PASS failures:0 skipped:1 (22 new legacy-refresh assertions ok); regression test_installers_e2e --installer bash 16 passed 0 failed. Real ~/.claude/skills left untouched (plan-mode read-only), still 0.1.42.
trace.verify_output: PASS - failures: 0, skipped: 1 (new: legacy refresh 22 assertions ok); regression node scripts/test_installers_e2e.mjs --installer bash: 16 passed, 0 failed
